title: Copy/Paste Column Settings
excerpt: It would be great to be able to copy/paste column settings to expedite & simplify setup.

posts.author: GPJ (Gary Paull Jr)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to copy/paste column settings to expedite & simplify setup.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @GPJ - you can duplicate columns that will retain the settings. You just need to rename the duplicate column afterwards.

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: GPJ (Gary Paull Jr)
posts.cookedHtml:
Doesn’t work to bring settings from one board to another, or from a group to a subitem.

I did just realize that it’s basically a feature (column settings templates) that comes with enterprise however…

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @GPJ - I see, apologies I didn’t grasp the initial question. Yes, you are correct column templates are a great feature, sadly only for ENT customers.

Thanks,
Mark
